warnings: The dbf GW template (cited as arXiv:2511.15687) could not be verified through public searches. The reference is included with a caveat note in the report.
The semianalytic pipeline reference was verified as arXiv:2602.02829 (not 2602.02928 as cited in some upstream handoffs); the corrected ID is used.
The PTArcade posterior PDF was named conformal-SU2_posteriors.pdf rather than pta_posteriors.pdf; the LaTeX file uses the correct filename.
Float specifier warnings from LaTeX (h -> ht) are benign and do not affect the output.
approximations: High-temperature expansion of the one-loop finite-T effective potential
CW mechanism at one loop; higher-order corrections neglected
No RG running or Daisy resummation included
dbf GW template used for all points, including moderate-alpha regime where its validity is less established
PTArcade ceffyl mode as approximation to full time-domain likelihood
Single MCMC chain (7501 effective samples) without Gelman-Rubin convergence diagnostic

included_sections.name: The Model
notes: Includes gauge group, particle content, Lagrangian, SSB pattern, CW mechanism, free and dependent parameters

included_sections.name: First-Order Phase Transition
notes: Includes semianalytic pipeline method, two-stage scan strategy, results summary table, literature comparison with Borah et al. (2021)

included_sections.name: Gravitational-Wave Spectrum
notes: Includes template choice, benchmark scan against NANOGrav violins, best 14/14 benchmarks table, benchmark spectrum figure

included_sections.name: PTArcade Bayesian Analysis
notes: Includes posterior table, posterior distribution figure, MAP spectrum figure

included_sections.name: Constraints
notes: 11 constraints summarised with table; Delta N_eff and DM overproduction discussed as key unresolved constraints

included_sections.name: Assumptions and Limitations
notes: 42 assumptions audited; severity distribution table; critical unresolved assumptions table; 10 required follow-ups

included_sections.name: Discussion
notes: Caveats on dbf template verifiability, secluded dark sector, MCMC convergence, model novelty

included_sections.name: Conclusions
notes: Direct answer to the original user question

included_sections.name: References
notes: 19 references including verified arXiv papers, Coleman-Weinberg original, NANOGrav, PTArcade
